title: Unnai Kanda Naal Mudhal Lyrics Salim Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Unnai Kanda Naal Mudhal
Singer(s): Supriya Joshi, Hemachandra, Srinivasan
Movie: Salim
Lyrics: Annamalai
Music: Vijay Antony

Unnai kanda naal mudhal
en thookkam ponadhu.
Thoonginaalum un mugam
ennendru sollvadhu.

Unnai kanda naal mudhal
en thookkam ponadhu.
Thoonginaalum un mugam
ennendru sollvadhu.

Enadhu thozhil thazhaiyai saaithu
nerungi nee vazha vendum.
pirindhu neeyum nadakkum podhu
en idhayam kaayam padum.

vizhigal paarthu viragal korthu
madiyil naan thoonga vendum.
Unadhu anbil karaiyumpodhu
udhattil poo pooththidum.

Ulagamey marakkiren
siragillai , parakkiren
mazhai illai nenaigiren
unnil karaigiren.

Unnai kanda naal mudhal
en thookkam ponadhu.
Thoonginaalum un mugam
ennendru sollvadhu.

Siriththu pesum unadhu vaarththai
dhinamum naan ketkavendum.
Uravu endru yevarumillai
en ulagam nee aagidum.

Idhayam thannil araigal naangil
enakku nee mattum vendum
Tharaiyin meley nizhalai pole
innaindhu naam vaazhanum.

Unnai kanda naal mudhal
en thookkam ponadhu.
Thoonginaalum un mugam
ennendru sollvadhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Salim, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Hemachandran, Srinivasan, and Supriya Joshi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Unnai Kanda Naal Mudhal was composed by the renowned Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 9, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unnai Kanda Naal Mudhal, the characters express their profound love and yearning through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Salim, encapsulating the essence of romance and emotional connection. With its soothing melody and captivating vocals, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track beautifully conveys the complexities of love, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnai Kanda Naal Mudhal from the movie Salim is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully showcases the emotions of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hemachandran, Srinivasan, and Supriya Joshi, this song creates a mesmerizing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The unique collaboration of talented artists and the enchanting music by Vijay Antony make this track a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: Since the day I saw you, my sleep has been disturbed. Even in sleep, I keep saying your face.
You fell into my eyes and became part of my life.
Since the day I saw you, my sleep has been disturbed. Even in sleep, I keep saying your face.
You need to rise and shine, leaving behind my work troubles. When you walk away, my heart will ache.
I need to sleep in the shade, looking at the stars. When your love embraces me, flowers will bloom in my heart.
I forget the world and enjoy life. I think of you and feel you in my heart.
Since the day I saw you, my sleep has been disturbed. Even in sleep, I keep saying your face.
I want to hear your sweet words every day. No one else matters; you become my world.
In my heart, I only need you. We should live like shadows on the earth together.
I smile at the troubles and enjoy the world. I feel you in my heart and cherish you.
Since the day I saw you, my sleep has been disturbed. Even in sleep, I keep saying your face.
You fell into my eyes and became part of my life.
